chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.3193 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 26.02.2026 Mr. Aijazuddin Warsi, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP PI Shahnawaz Chandio of PS Aziz Bhatti ------------------------------------ Applicant Mir Ahmed son of Muhammad Shareef seeks pre-arrest bail FIR No.340/2024, registered at P.S. Sohrab Goth, Karachi for offence under Sections 324, 511, 337-F(i), PPC. It has come on record that applicant has directly approached this Court without exhausting alternate remedy by way of filing application under sections 498, 498-A, PPC before learned Sessions Court. Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal bail application and requests that this application may be converted into protective bail in order to enable the applicant to exhaust the alternate remedy. Learned A.P.G. has recorded no objection. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, the same is converted into protective bail and, without touching the merits of the case, applicant/accused above named is admitted to protective bail for period of five days from today on the same terms and conditions as contained in the order dated 19.11.2025. Instant criminal bail application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Gusher/PS
